title: Pillage and Plunder
description:
Vanilla ++ Ships that Create the BEST experience. (COMING SOON) 
We are switching to NeoForge from ver.1.0.0
body:
## **Wave 1 is almost here! Buckle up for a new adventure with brand new ship types such as the Sloop, and the Cutter. Old blocks will be removed for a simpler understanding of this mod. Be prepared for new adventures!**

Note: We will be switching to NeoForge 1.21.1(21.1.92) from ver.1.0.0 with other mod loaders being added in the future.

As you level up throughout your journey, you will be able to access upgrades for your ship including: Cannon upgrades, Sail upgrades, Crew upgrades and Hull upgrades.[COMING SOON]

You will also be able to customise your ship in this mod.[COMING SOON]

Enjoy!
(After v1.0 the mod will be transferred to NeoForge 1.21.1)

## Ship Types:

## **Sloop**
![Sloop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6606a29a0546ff211dd2301a84e0c1f7cfff4fb0.png)

[Cutter, Ketch, Schooner, Brig, Brigantine, Galleon, Frigate, Man Of War, _Second Rate, First Rate_ _(Ships of the Line)_ COMING SOON]

(This mod is still in development so expect many bugs and glitches. If there are any bugs/glitches please report them to me so I can fix them ASAP)
